data_description.host: Hostname or IP (e.g. http://127.0.0.1). Leave as default when running under Supervisor.
data_description.port: TCP port the add-on is listening on (default 8099).

hassio_confirm.title: HA MCP Bridge discovered
hassio_confirm.description: Set up Home Assistant to connect to the discovered add-on: **{addon}**?

mcp_setup.title: MCP Server (optional)
mcp_setup.description:
Optionally connect to an MCP server. Leave blank to skip — you can add this later via the integration options.

Example: http://homeassistant.local:8123/api/mcp_server/sse

data_description.mcp_url: Full URL of the MCP Server endpoint. Leave blank to skip.
data_description.mcp_token: Bearer token for authentication. Leave blank if not required.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Make sure the add-on is installed and running.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the add-on. Start it and try again from Settings → Devices & Services.

data_description.update_interval: How often HA fetches the add-on health status. Minimum 10 s, maximum 3600 s.
